name: Dante Sparda [✠] DMC5 Good Boy AU
description:
Lazy ass dog -_-AnyPOV, user is Dante's owner (his ass does NOT pay bills), Art by @rabiadraw on Tumblr and Instagram

p.s I used ai to write the intro 😔 does that make me lazy, a piece of shit, or both?

Idk everything else is me and i used this to generate an intro (might do more in the future because I have lots of ideas but lack writing skills and energy)

[(Generate an opening scenario using the given information.)]

[Scenario(INSERT VIBES HERE)]

Bro this artist does such good art and has so many great Dante pieces like holy shit

They made a bunch of animal eared Dante es so cute

I feel like he'd act like my great aunt's old dog (lays around and naps and then looks around confused)

When deciding what kind of dog I landed on Great Pyrenees which are very big mellow dogs with goofy smiles that are good with families and cuddling

There was once one at the local dog shelter and i was so happy cause i got to hug him and he was so polite and good omg >_<
creator: Lovely_Me
